mapper.insert: insert into sellers( user_id, company_name, business_number, representative_name, opening_date, business_address) values( #{user_id}, #{company_name}, #{business_number}, #{representative_name}, #{opening_date}, #{business_address} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PAID' THEN o.order_id END) AS newOrderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PREPARING' THEN o.order_id END) AS preparingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'SHIPPING' THEN o.order_id END) AS shippingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'DELIVERED' THEN o.order_id END) AS deliveredCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN o.order_id END) AS cancelledCount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' AND stock > 0 THEN 1 END) AS onSaleCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' AND stock = 0 THEN 1 END) AS outOfStockCount FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{seller_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON p.product_id = q.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND q.answered_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON p.product_id = q.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}
